LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF DOE I IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE THE ORDER INCLUDED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend The Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend The Complaint TO Change the name of Doe 1.

Plaintiff Mid-Century Insurance Company's motion for leave of court to amend the complaint to change the name of Doe I is granted. No opposition filed. The court will execute the order included with the moving papers.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
